## LibertyMD Clinical Change

### Change class

- [ ] Safety critical
- [ ] Clinical behavior
- [ ] Model or workflow
- [ ] Privacy or identity
- [ ] Presentation only

### Patient impact

Describe what changes for a patient, including failure modes and affected care states.

### Versions

- Previous:
- Proposed:
- Rollback:

### Evidence

- [ ] `npm run test:libertymd:ci`
- [ ] `npm run test:libertymd:evaluation`
- [ ] Database integration tests when applicable
- [ ] Before/after structured outputs attached without patient data
- [ ] Version registry updated

### Approval

- Engineering owner:
- Licensed clinical owner:
- Privacy/security owner, when applicable:
- Legal/regulatory owner, when applicable:

### Rollback trigger

State the measurable condition that will cause immediate rollback.
